# SQL Challenge 07 – Vector Search

## Problem
Make searchs inside the table including the first chunks of the selected article in this case:
"Emu War"
![The Great Emu War](image_emu.jpg)

After the processing of the Article we make different searches a example query below:

## Example Query
```sql
SELECT
    chunk_id,
    SUBSTR(chunk_text, 1, 100) AS preview,
    ROUND(VECTOR_DISTANCE(chunk_vector, TO_VECTOR(TO_CLOB('[0.03400305, 0.00322595, -0.07909144, -0.00801522, -0.02352589, 0.00542515, 0.07025961, -0.02755992, 0.05341672, -0.04966275, 0.05524356, -0.03659071, 0.06785350, 0.00907899, -0.01233120, 0.04197464, 0.04219852, 0.06288496, -0.09514914, -0.03453569]', 384, FLOAT32), COSINE), 4) AS similarity_score
FROM doc_chunks
ORDER BY similarity_score ASC
FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY;
